summary: DevOps phase complete. Iter-1 is presentation-layer only — no CI/CD changes required. Existing `.github/workflows/ci.yml` is syntactically valid and functionally ready for all 5 module PRs. Pre-flight checklist passed: Flutter setup, dart analyze gate, flutter test gate, code generation step, Firebase config injection from secrets, .env file injection, APK build job, branch protection all verified. docs/DEPLOY.md created with comprehensive deployment guide, env var reference, secrets setup instructions, troubleshooting, and future iteration roadmap. No new packages, no new env vars, no native config changes required. Phase contract and handoff finalized. Sign-off: GREEN ✅

qualityGates.name: required_artifacts_present
qualityGates.detail: docs/handoffs/devops.md (CI details, local setup, env vars, known gaps, changelog), docs/DEPLOY.md (deployment guide, secrets, troubleshooting, roadmap), docs/handoffs/contracts/iter-1/devops.json (this file), .claude/skills/devops-skill.md (skill update), .github/workflows/ci.yml (existing pipeline, validated)

qualityGates.name: ci_checks_passed_or_accepted
qualityGates.detail: .github/workflows/ci.yml is syntactically valid (validated with python3 yaml.safe_load). Pipeline triggers on iter-*, main, PRs to main, and version tags. Analyze-and-test job gates on dart analyze and flutter test. No new violations or test failures from QA phase (28 pass, 4 pre-existing failures unchanged). APK build job configured for version tags.

qualityGates.name: security_checks
qualityGates.detail: No secrets committed to repository. All env vars injected from GitHub Actions secrets at build time. Firebase config files (google-services.json, GoogleService-Info.plist) are never committed — base64-encoded versions in secrets and decoded during CI. .env file is gitignored; .env.example contains placeholders only. GOOGLE_SERVICES_JSON and GOOGLE_SERVICE_INFO_PLIST secrets are base64-encoded and decoded in workflow steps.

qualityGates.name: pre_flight_checklist
qualityGates.detail: All pre-flight items completed: (1) CI workflow syntactically valid, (2) Flutter setup with subosito/flutter-action@v2 confirmed, (3) dart analyze gate configured, (4) flutter test gate configured, (5) Code generation step included, (6) Firebase config injection implemented, (7) .env file injection working, (8) APK build job for version tags, (9) Branch protection allows iter-1 workflow. No blocking issues.

qualityGates.name: environment_documentation
qualityGates.detail: docs/DEPLOY.md fully documents environment setup: 12 .env variables with purpose/example, GitHub Actions secrets reference, Firebase config file handling, CI/CD pipeline details, local development setup, release workflow, troubleshooting, and roadmap for iter-2+ (Mapbox cache, FCM, Apple Sign-In). All secrets are listed and explained.

qualityGates.name: no_ci_changes_required
qualityGates.detail: Per architect-for-devops.md, iter-1 requires NO CI changes: presentation-layer only, no new packages, no new env vars, no native config changes. Existing pipeline is sufficient. .github/workflows/ci.yml remains unchanged from prior state.

qualityGates.name: deployment_guide
qualityGates.detail: docs/DEPLOY.md serves as comprehensive deployment guide covering: .env setup, GitHub Actions secrets configuration, Firebase config file handling, CI/CD pipeline triggers and jobs, local development simulation, release workflow (version bumping, tagging, artifact download), and troubleshooting common issues. Future iterations (2-5) have separate sections with planned changes.
